cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 27% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.27% · BTC -0.77% · Gold -1.29% · Nasdaq100 -1.29%. 27% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.64%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.64%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.48%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -11.10%
cards.body: Leaders: INTU +5.90%, AVAV +5.27%, ADBE +3.94%, CRM +3.78%, WDAY +3.26%. Laggards: SKHY -11.10%, SMR -9.75%, OKLO -9.65%, CEVA -9.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.20% at $132.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
